blocks.content: Keisha found me by the water fountain before lunch. She didn't do a buildup.

blocks.speaker: Keisha
blocks.content: I'm still watching. For the record.

blocks.speaker: Keisha
blocks.content: I'm not rushing you. I'm just saying she's not a replacement. She's her own thing. You should know that before Jonathan tries to connect those dots for you.

blocks.speaker: Larry
blocks.content: How do you know what Jonathan is doing.
She turned and walked. One line. Perfect execution.
Keisha had said in Episode 1 she was watching. This was that. She hadn't forgotten, hadn't softened the promise. She'd just waited for the right moment to prove it.
Maya isn't Crystal. She's her own thing.
I thought about that for the rest of the day.
